name: Corecon Construction Management API
what_it_does: Corecon REST API for construction project management and estimating software. Enables AI agents to manage construction projects and budgets, handle bidding and subcontractor management, track change orders and RFIs, manage scheduling and resource allocation, access project financials and cost reporting, handle document control, and integrate construction data with accounting systems like QuickBooks.
use_cases: Managing project budgets and cost tracking from construction financial agents
Handling bid solicitation and subcontractor management from procurement agents
Tracking change orders and contract modifications from project control agents
Retrieving project status and milestone data from construction reporting agents
not_for: Large enterprise construction without small to mid-market project management focus
Residential homebuilding without commercial construction workflows
Real estate development without active construction project management
best_when: A general contractor, subcontractor, or specialty contractor using Corecon wants AI agents to automate bid management, change order tracking, subcontractor coordination, and project cost reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction contract data including change orders and pay applications affects project financial exposure. Automated contract modifications must be reviewed before execution.

auth.notes: Corecon uses API key authentication. Company-level credentials. API access for integration development. Partner program for accounting and ERP integrations. No granular scope control.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free starter plan with basic features; API on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing; entry-level, Team, and Enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: Boca Raton, Florida company. Founded 2003. SMB construction focus. Strong QuickBooks integration. More affordable than Procore for small contractors. Cloud-based with mobile apps.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Change orders and pay applications affect project financial exposure
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
No webhooks — requires polling for project updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full company data access
SMB construction focus — limited enterprise-scale API capabilities vs Procore
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction project financial and contract data. SOC2. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction project and financial data. SOC2. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.
